## Public Release Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, private documents, local dumps, generated caches, or unsigned screenshots are included.
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior, setup, or workflow changed.
- [ ] Public claims are proven, roadmap, or disabled with evidence.
- [ ] Security boundary reviewed if upload, auth, provider egress, or deployment changed.
